subcodes.first_line: O servants of the Abhá Beauty! Your endeavours in the path of Truth are known and praiseworthy, and the sweet fragrances of your love are wafting at the Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان جمال ابهی مساعیتان در راه حق معلوم و ممدوح و نفحات حبتان در آستان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @love of God, @call to action, @knowledge; recognition of God
